summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VRCStudio version patching functionality. All core features are working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Minor Buffer type compatibility warnings in TypeScript compilation

passed_tests: Patched file maintains correct UnityFS header structure
All version string occurrences are replaced in the bundle
New IPC handlers fs:patchVrcaVersion and fs:analyzeBundle are properly defined in preload.ts
IPC handlers are correctly implemented in main.ts
Version patching preserves file size and structure
Error handling is comprehensive with proper logging
Binary analysis confirms complete version string replacement
